title: 051a MISHA goes to SCHOOL - R/Esub
description:
Hallo lieber Jürg,

habe heute mit großer Freude Dein Werk gesehen und muß Dir sagen, der Film gefällt mir sogar sehr gut.
Wie beneide ich Dich darum, Filme machen zu können, die ohne diese geforderten Infokommentare auskommen dürfen, bei denen ausschließlich die Stimmung von Situationen in Bild und O-Ton wirken und damit ohne störende Kommentare eine hohe Authentizität und auch Informationen enthalten.
Bin in der 2. Februarhälte wieder in Moskau.
Herzlichen Gruß Wolfgang.
Berlin, 24.Januar 2005

Yorka!
At the end of the story, you will find all has been told.
No talking. People & Animals living on Land. Easy true with perfect
picture/sound design.
Misha Goes to School! Great, a very emotional film!
Yurika
Moscow, 16.2.2005

Synopsis
On the Arctic Circle Helicopter pilot Andrej Gaianov regularly drops the Lukoil workers at their oil platform for the 10 day shift work. 1000km into the Tundra we reach our final destination. In unfavorable, dangerous weather conditions, which change every ten minutes, Helicopter pilot Gaianov searches with his bare eyes for Vladimir Arteyev, Reindeer farmer of 3000 animals.
In the Tundra, in no-man's land, I meet Misha, his mother Olga and the rest of the family. It is an emotional encounter.
That's where it all starts: Misha as a symbol of leaving home and shouldering his bag - as the workers do in their daily routine -- outlines the Beginning of the Story as he goes for his first School Day to Usinsk.
